top_signals.title: Bitcoin slips below $64,000 as hawkish Fed overshadows signs of onchain repair
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as BTC ETFs post an $82.2 million net outflow, and Glassnode said improving liquidity may be forming a floor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Apple fixes Beats Studio Buds flaw that let hackers spy on conversations
top_signals.summary: Apple has released security updates to patch a high-severity flaw affecting the Beats Studio Buds wireless earbuds that could allow attackers in Bluetooth range to spy on users' conversations. [...]
